case_title: RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC VS. MARUJA VANDERMEULEN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERMEULEN, MARUJA
